summary: A FAB-3000 bomb with a universal glider module struck Ukrainian positions in Krasny Liman, captured via optical fiber FPV drone "KVN." Russian forces destroyed Ukrainian 2S22 "Bogdan" self-propelled artillery, M109, and T-64BV tanks on March 5, 2026, with 128 total targets hit. A Russian Ka-27 helicopter was destroyed by an FPV drone strike on the "Sivash" drilling platform in the Black Sea, alongside USV attacks controlled via Starlink. Ukrainian "Yolka" interceptor drones intercepted a "Furriya" reconnaissance drone on the Donetsk front, while a "Lyutyi" drone strike was prevented on the Sumy front.
